p.strong: State: Thief thread attempting to steal from Victim (Owner) thread

ul.li: Memory Layout: Buffer size must be a power of two to allow t & (size - 1) masking.
Memory Ordering: Uses Acquire for loads and Release for stores. CAS is SeqCst.
Owner Ops: Owner performs Push (at bottom) and Pop (at bottom-1).
Thief Ops: Thieves perform Steal (at top).

g.text: return Empty // Queue is empty or shrinking

text.tspan: Task A is copied to local register.
It remains in buffer until CAS succeeds.

g.text: 🔵 Blue: Logic gates and occupancy validation
🟣 Purple: Memory buffer and task payload

div.p: CRITICAL INVARIANT Prevents the thief from seeing a 'bottom' value that is newer than the 'top' value it just read. Ensures: t = Load(top) happens BEFORE b = Load(bottom).
